studio_setups.name: High-Key Clean White
studio_setups.logic: Shadowless environment, pure white background, soft global illumination.

studio_setups.name: Luxury Dark (Black Ice)
studio_setups.logic: Reflective black floor, single rim light, heavy negative fill.

studio_setups.name: Cyberpunk Neon Studio
studio_setups.logic: Dual-tone lighting (Cyan & Magenta), backlight glow, wet floor reflections.
